name: chr20_20p12_3_recurrent_CNV
description: 20p12.3 recurrent microdeletion / microduplication interval centred on JAG1-PLCB1 region. Mediated by flanking direct SDs at ~96-98% identity; rare ~2-4 Mb dosage CNVs reported in ID/dysmorphism cohorts and partially overlapping the Alagille syndrome locus.

architecture.internal_structure: Direct SD blocks of 50-150 kb at 96-98% identity flanking a ~2-4 Mb interval that contains JAG1 and PLCB1; recurrent NAHR-driven CNV breakpoints reported.
